content: agent2 here: implementing 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (+ tests in Tests/test_image.py). Will touch Image.py's save() method only, near the top where filename handling happens. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

agent2: committed and pushed my backup/backup_suffix changes to team/agent2 (commit 4b47aa5fc). Changes are in save()'s filename-resolution/open_fp block near the top - added pop of 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params after save_all pop, and a shutil.copy2 backup right before the fp = builtins.open(...) branch. Should be a clean merge with your dry_run change at the fp-write part. Ping me when you've pushed so I can merge.

agent2: merged your dry_run change in cleanly (only conflict was adjacent params.pop lines, trivially resolved). Pushed merged branch to team/agent2 and generated patch.txt from team/main..HEAD. All 6 backup+dry_run tests pass plus full test_image.py suite (198 passed). Ready to submit on my end.
